g.text: Raspberry Pi J8 — HIL wiring to the ULX3S/DUT
Canonical 40-pin J8 (identical Pi B+..Pi 5). Odd physical pins fan left, even fan right. Coloured pins carry the committed HIL role from wiring/pi_pinmap.csv.
SPI0 BMC-flash → BMC_FW1 flash DI (verify SPI-slave)
UART0 BMC-console → AST_UART1 → FPGA UART RX
UART0 BMC-console → AST_UART1 ← FPGA UART TX
strap-verify → PANEL1 PLED (Pi drives, verify FPGA input RTL)
UART COM1 → COM1 → FPGA RX (TTL, pre-MAX3232)
SPI1 BIOS-flash → FU1 flash DI (verify SPI-slave)
